title: The $2 Trillion AI IPO Gold Rush (And Why It Should Worry You)
description:
OpenAI, Anthropic, and SpaceX are all racing toward near-trillion-dollar IPOs in a single quarter — the biggest wealth event in tech history. But the valuations dwarf the actual revenue, and the same month Anthropic filed to go public, it warned its own AI may be too dangerous to release. Here's what's really happening, and whether this is the top of the AI bubble or just the beginning.

Sources: CNBC, Fortune, TechCrunch, Time, Goldman Sachs (2026).
